question: அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகளில் உள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டிற்கான ஆரம்ப கர்ப்ப பராமரிப்பு பதிவுகளின் சதவீதத்தின் அடிப்படையில் வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) * 100.0 / SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) AS EARLY_REGISTRATION_PERCENTAGE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 0 ORDER BY EARLY_REGISTRATION_PERCENTAGE DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography.sub_district,
       (SUM(fact_maternal_registration_testing.anc_registered_within_1st_trimester) / NULLIF(SUM(fact_maternal_registration_testing.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc), 0)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM fact_maternal_registration_testing
JOIN dim_geography ON fact_maternal_registration_testing.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id
JOIN dim_time ON fact_maternal_registration_testing.time_id = dim_time.time_id
WHERE dim_geography.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND dim_time.year = 2021
GROUP BY dim_geography.sub_district
ORDER BY percentage DESC;
